message:
feat(text): S3-FIFO width cache as drop-in replacement for LRU (bd-l6yba.2)

S3FifoWidthCache provides scan-resistant eviction for text width lookups,
protecting frequently-used entries from one-time scans. Same API as
WidthCache (get_or_compute, contains, stats, clear). FNV fingerprint
guard detects 64-bit hash collisions. 10 tests including scan resistance
and equivalence verification against LRU.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
